_title: UiPath Automation Ops — Complete Governance Policy Reference
_usage: This file is documentation only. Copy the relevant policy block into your compliance pack (e.g. hipaa_policies.json) and adjust values.

_policy_metadata._description: Fields common to ALL policy types — set in the policy shell, not in policyFormData

name.description: Unique display name shown in Automation Ops UI

priority.description: Lower number = higher precedence when multiple group-level policies apply to same user

availability.description: How long the product caches the policy when it cannot reach Automation Ops

AITrustLayer._description: Controls which generative AI features and third-party AI providers users can access. Applied to all UiPath products that call external LLMs.

global-control-toggle.description: Master switch. Must be true for all sub-controls to take effect. Set false to disable ALL AI governance (not recommended).

agents.description: Enable UiPath Agents (autonomous AI agents). Disable to block agent creation and execution.

agenthub.description: Enable Agent Hub / Coded Agents. Disable to block coded agent deployments.

apps.description: Enable AI features inside UiPath Apps (e.g. AI-powered form filling, Autopilot in apps).

jarvis.description: Enable Autopilot for Everyone (Jarvis). Disable to prevent end-users from using the Autopilot assistant.

documentunderstanding.description: Enable Document Understanding AI features. When enabled, documents are sent to LLM APIs for extraction. Disable if documents contain sensitive data not covered by BAA/DPA.

communicationsmining.description: Enable Communications Mining (IXP). Processes emails/tickets through AI classification.

healing-agent.description: Enable Healing Agent GenAI recovery. Allows automation to self-heal UI failures using AI. Disable for strict deterministic execution.

wingman.description: Enable Wingman AI assistant (Studio/Studio Web AI suggestions). Disable to prevent AI-generated code suggestions.

uipath-testmanager.description: Enable Test Manager AI features (AI-generated test cases, analysis).

uia.description: Enable UIAutomation GenAI activities (Computer Vision, etc.). Note: core UIAutomation (non-AI) is unaffected by this toggle.

uipath-ai-rdk.description: Enable UiPath AI Runtime Dev Kit (GenAI activities package). Disable to block custom LLM activity usage in automations.

saveprompts.description: Save all AI prompt inputs and model outputs to trace logs. Required for audit trails. Maps to 'Input/output saving for audit' in the UI.

traces-ttl-enforcement.description: Enforce a maximum retention period on AI trace data. When false, traces are retained for 30 days. When true, traces-ttl applies.

traces-ttl.description: Maximum retention for AI trace data when enforcement is on. Only '1d' and '7d' are accepted by the API.

traces-ttl-effective.description: Read-only effective value shown in UI. Set same as traces-ttl when enforcement is on.

traces-disable-insights.description: Prevent AI trace data from flowing into UiPath Insights analytics. Enable to reduce data exposure surface for sensitive workloads.

container.description: PII scanning controls applied to data passing through AI calls in-flight.

pii-in-flight-agents.description: Scan and redact PII in data sent to/from Agents at runtime.

pii-in-flight-uipath-ai-rdk.description: Scan and redact PII in data sent to/from UiPath AI RDK activities at runtime.

anthropic-control-toggle.description: Allow use of Anthropic (Claude) models. Disable until Anthropic BAA/DPA is in place.

azure-openai-control-toggle.description: Allow use of Azure OpenAI models. Microsoft Azure has HIPAA BAA available — verify before enabling.

gemini-control-toggle.description: Allow use of Google Gemini models. Disable until Google Cloud DPA is verified.

submit.description: Internal form submission flag. Always set to true.

pii-entity-table.description: List of PII entity categories to detect and redact. Each entry controls one category.

pii-entity-confidence-threshold.description: Minimum confidence score for detection. Lower = more sensitive but more false positives.

pii-entity-is-enabled.description: Whether this category is actively scanned.

identifier.description: Unique row key required by the API. Format: category name + threshold value concatenated.

Studio._description: Controls Studio IDE behavior — analyzer enforcement, code quality gates, publishing rules, and design defaults. Applied when users open Studio.

enforceAnalyzerBeforePublish.description: Block publishing to Orchestrator if Workflow Analyzer finds errors.

enforceAnalyzerBeforeRun.description: Block local debug/run if Workflow Analyzer finds errors.

enforceAnalyzerBeforePushCheckIn.description: Block Git push/check-in if Workflow Analyzer finds errors.

analyzeRpaXamlFilesOnly.description: When true, Analyzer only runs on RPA XAML files, skipping test files and coded workflows.

enforceCheckInBeforePublish.description: Require source control check-in before publishing (ensures all code is versioned).

exportAnalyzerResults.description: Automatically export Workflow Analyzer results to a file on each run. Studio only (not StudioX).

enforceReleaseNotes.description: Require developers to add release notes before publishing. Studio only.

enableAiActivitySuggestions.description: Enable AI-powered activity suggestions (Wingman) in the Activities panel.

autoUpdatePackagesForAutopilot.description: Automatically update activity packages to versions required by Autopilot.

enableAllAvailableActivities.description: Show all activities including unlicensed ones. When false, only licensed activities appear.

allowPreviewPackagesInActivitiesPanel.description: Show preview/pre-release packages in the Activities panel.

separateRuntimeDependencies.description: Split design-time and runtime dependencies into separate nuspec sections. Improves robot deployment reliability.

includeSources.description: Include source XAML files in the published NuGet package. Required for source-level audit.

objectRepositoryEnforced.description: Require use of Object Repository for UI element descriptors. Improves maintainability.

defaultLanguage.description: Default coding language for new projects.

useModernForNewProjects.description: Use Modern design experience for new projects (recommended for new deployments).

defaultCompatibility.description: Default target framework for new projects.

allowedCompatibilityFrameworks.description: Which target frameworks developers are allowed to select. Limit to enforce standardization.

StudioWeb._description: Controls the browser-based Studio Web IDE. Focused on agentic/AI workflow development gates.

enforceMinAgentScore.description: Block publishing if agent quality score is below the configured threshold.

enforceMaxTemperature.description: Block publishing if LLM temperature setting exceeds the configured maximum. Controls output determinism.

enforceMaxTokens.description: Block publishing if max tokens per agent response exceeds the configured limit.

allowUserFeedback.description: Allow users to send feedback on AI outputs.

allowImportProjects.description: Allow users to import existing projects into Studio Web.

allowPublishOutsidePersonalWorkspace.description: Allow publishing to shared Orchestrator folders (not just Personal Workspace).

allowAutopilot.description: Allow use of Autopilot within Studio Web.

enforceDependenciesAutoUpdate.description: Automatically update activity packages to latest compatible versions.

ST-USG-014.description: AllowedPackages rule — controls which NuGet packages can be used.

ST-USG-026.description: AllowedActivities rule — controls which activity types can be used.

Robot._description: Runtime governance rules enforced by the Robot executor. Block or warn when automations interact with unauthorized apps/URLs or send emails to blocked recipients.

runtimeAnalyzerRules.description: List of runtime governance rules. Currently two supported rule IDs.

RT-UIA-001._description: App/URL Restrictions — blocks or warns when automation interacts with unauthorized applications or URLs.
RT-UIA-001._applies_to: All UI automation activities; packages: GSuite, Mail, Office 365

action.description: Error = halt execution. Warning = log and continue.

whitelistApps.format: comma or semicolon separated, supports wildcards * and ?
whitelistApps.description: Applications explicitly allowed. Whitelist takes priority over blacklist when both configured.

whitelistUrls.format: comma or semicolon separated, supports wildcards * and ?

blacklistApps.format: comma or semicolon separated, supports wildcards * and ?

blacklistUrls.format: comma or semicolon separated, supports wildcards * and ?

CustomMessage.default: UI automation detected on '{0}' which is not an allowed application/url as defined by your organization.
CustomMessage.description: Message shown to user/logged when rule triggers. {0} = the blocked app/URL name.

RT-OUT-001._description: Email Outbound Blocklist — blocks or warns when automation sends email to blocked recipients.
RT-OUT-001._applies_to: Send Email, Reply To Email, Forward Email, Send Notifications, Create Calendar Event activities

action.description: Error = halt execution. Warning = log and continue.

blocklist.format: email addresses or domains, comma or semicolon separated
blocklist.description: Email addresses/domains that automations are not allowed to contact.

CustomMessage.default: The email recipient '{0}' is restricted by your organization's governance policy.
CustomMessage.description: Message shown/logged when rule triggers. {0} = the blocked recipient.

Assistant._description: Controls UiPath Assistant runtime features — widgets, feature availability, and execution context for attended users.

allowCustomWidgets.description: Allow users to add custom (non-official) widgets to their Assistant.

useOfficialFeeds.description: Restrict widget installation to official UiPath NuGet feeds only.

widgets.description: List of widgets and whether they are enabled. Unlisted widgets follow allowCustomWidgets.

version.description: Pin to specific version or leave empty for latest

allowLoggingLevelChange.description: Allow users to change the logging verbosity in Assistant settings.

displayEDRProtectionStatus.description: Show EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) protection status indicator in Assistant.

allowRunOutsidePersonalWorkspace.description: Allow users to run automations from shared Orchestrator folders (not only Personal Workspace).

allowShareAutomationUrl.description: Allow users to copy and share automation trigger URLs.

enablePictureInPicture.description: Enable Picture-in-Picture mode (run attended automations in isolated virtual desktop).

enableStudioWeb.description: Show the Studio Web launch button in Assistant.

enableActionCenter.description: Enable Action Center integration for human-in-the-loop task approval workflows.

autoLaunchAtStartup.description: Automatically start Assistant when Windows starts.

minimizeAssistantDuringExecution.description: Minimize the Assistant window when an automation is running.

enableTaskCapture.description: Enable Task Capture (screen recording for process documentation).

enableTaskMining.description: Enable Task Mining (AI process discovery from user activity).

useLocalUserPreferences.description: Allow users to override certain Assistant settings with local preferences.

IntegrationService._description: Controls which third-party connectors and authentication methods are available to automations. Applied when automations create connections or call connector activities.
IntegrationService._important: Policy affects new connections only. Existing connections and running workflows are not affected. Allow up to 5 minutes for policy cache refresh.

defaultConnectorState.description: Default state for connectors not explicitly listed. Set to 'Disabled' for zero-trust (deny-all) posture.

IntegrationService._connector_note: Individual connectors are enabled/disabled in the Automation Ops UI after the policy is created. Each connector supports: enable/disable toggle, allowed authentication types, pre-defined authentication parameters (e.g. API keys, OAuth2 client credentials, custom site URLs).

priority_order.2_middle: Group-level policy (lowest priority number wins when user in multiple groups)
priority_order.4_fallback: File-based governance (Studio/StudioX only, when no Orchestrator connection)

options_per_level.No Policy: Disables governance enforcement at this level
options_per_level.Inherit: Inherits from the next higher level
